title: CodeMirrorEditor React component with line numbers and tab handling
purpose: Provides a styled textarea editor with optional line numbers, tab indentation support, and read-only mode. Used as a lightweight code editor replacement.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named CodeMirrorEditor that accepts various props for customization including content, callbacks, styling, and behavior flags.

steps.content: Initialize line number calculation based on current content.
Set up change handler that updates content when user types.
Set up key down handler that manages tab key behavior for indentation.
Render a container with styling for the editor area.
IF line numbers are enabled, render a gutter with line number indicators.
Render the main textarea with appropriate styling and event handlers.
IF language is specified, render a badge showing the language hint.
Split the current content into lines using newline character.
Map each line to its corresponding line number starting from 1.
IF the editor is not read-only, update the content via the provided callback.
IF the editor is read-only, exit early without processing.
IF the tab key is pressed, prevent default tab behavior.
Calculate the current cursor position and selected text range.
Insert two spaces at the cursor position in the content.
Update the editor content with the modified text.
Move the cursor to the position after the inserted spaces.
